context: Tests whether the agent uses conversation_initiation_client_data with dynamic_variables for personalization, applies the sanitize option for sensitive data, uses branch_id and environment for test routing, and configures guardrails with the correct version, focus guardrail, and a retry trigger_action with a feedback template using {{trigger_reason}}.

checklist.name: dynamic_variables for personalization
checklist.description: Each outbound call passes patient_name and appointment_time (or equivalent) inside conversation_initiation_client_data.dynamic_variables

checklist.name: sanitize on sensitive variable
checklist.description: The dynamic variable or tool parameter handling for patient_dob (or equivalent sensitive field) sets sanitize=True / "sanitize": true

checklist.name: branch_id for test routing
checklist.description: Calls with is_test=True pass branch_id (e.g., 'branch_staging') inside conversation_initiation_client_data

checklist.name: environment for test routing
checklist.description: Calls with is_test=True also pass environment (e.g., 'staging') alongside branch_id inside conversation_initiation_client_data

checklist.name: No branch/environment for non-test
checklist.description: Calls where is_test=False do NOT pass branch_id or staging environment (they use default routing)

checklist.name: Guardrails version field
checklist.description: Guardrails configuration includes version: "1" (the current schema version)

checklist.name: Focus guardrail enabled
checklist.description: Guardrails config includes a focus object with is_enabled=True to keep the agent on-topic

checklist.name: Retry trigger_action
checklist.description: A guardrail's trigger_action uses retry mode (not end_session) for the blocked response handling

checklist.name: {{trigger_reason}} in feedback template
checklist.description: The guardrail retry feedback template string contains the {{trigger_reason}} placeholder

checklist.name: Correct outbound call method
checklist.description: Calls are made using client.conversational_ai.twilio.outbound_call() (not a raw HTTP request or incorrect method path)
